name: Chewy Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the butter, peanut butter, brown sugar, honey, eggs, and cinnamon until well combined.
2. Mix in the rolled oats, raisins, and peanuts until evenly distributed.
3. Press the mixture into an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan, spreading it out evenly.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Allow the bars to cool in the pan before transferring them to a cooling rack.
6. Once cooled, cut into bars.
7. Makes approximately 15 bars.
